brief: Geopolitical tensions and domestic controversies dominate today's news, while research advances AI world generation and interactive visualization.
news_summary: Key stories include potential Patriot missile production for Ukraine, fatal shootings by federal agents, and Trump's erratic behavior at NATO.
papers_summary: Research papers present AlayaWorld for playable video world generation and VisTCP for traditional Chinese painting representation.

todays_image.caption: Just as a console table provides a stable surface for strategic planning, a license to build Patriot missiles offers Ukraine a firm foundation for air defense.
todays_image.title: Console Tables
